calls.name: JSW Infrastructure
calls.reasoning: JSW Infra shows solid long-term fundamentals — ~20% revenue growth in FY26, a 30-year Kolkata NSD terminal concession win, and a ₹6,000 cr QIP plan to fund a ₹39,000 cr capex roadmap to 400 MTPA by FY30 — but Q4 FY26 reported PAT fell ~18% QoQ due to exceptional items (fire loss at Fujairah) and margin pressure, which creates near-term overhang. Beating NIFTY on any single day is close to a coin flip; entry here is defensible only for patient, long-horizon buyers who can absorb dilution risk.
